target: command transmission outcomes carry into After Action, campaign history, and tactical lessons

checks.name: queued command congestion
checks.evidence: queued five selected-brigade commands; UI showed 一括混線 +1秒 and each queued forecast showed 伝令予測 3秒 + 混線1秒

checks.name: arrival tracking
checks.evidence: after 一括発令 and 1x tick, battle log showed 第1戦列歩兵大隊へ阻止射撃が到達 and pending chip cleared

checks.name: after action command review
checks.evidence: After Action showed 伝令評価, 発令5件 / 遅延5件 / 混線5件 / 最長4秒, with per-order arrived/unarrived rows

checks.name: campaign carryover
checks.evidence: after applying result, Army Camp last message and selected unit history contained 伝令評価; tactical lesson summary showed 伝令評価1件 / 即応+1 / 統制+1 / 後退判断+1

checks.name: console errors
checks.evidence: in-app browser console error log was empty

notes: QA campaign was reset from the UI afterward; reset state returned to 第1戦略ターン and no 伝令評価 history remained visible.
